sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1483" key="a(dreph/bolos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁδρεπήβολος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (ἁδρός᾽ τὸ περὶ τὰς νοήσεις ἁ.</foreign> the <sense id="n1483.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">power of forming great</tr_> conceptions, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.1</biblScope> </bibl>:—in bad sense, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ambitious</tr_>, Vett. Val.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">43.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
